title: Perform a partial water change
description: Remove about a quarter of tank water and refill with dechlorinated, temperature-matched water.

dialogue.text: Regular water changes keep fish healthy. Unplug the filter and heater, then gather a gravel vacuum, 5 gallon bucket, water conditioner and utility cart. Remove about 25% of the water.

options.text: Got it. How do I start?

dialogue.text: Use the gravel vacuum to drain water into the bucket while lifting debris. Keep the intake clear of fish and stop once roughly a quarter of the water is gone.
Dose the bucket with water conditioner and match the temperature to the tank before refilling. Pour slowly to avoid shocking fish and wipe up any spills.

options.text: Tank refilled and fish are happy!
